docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $478.37 FILED BY RENT-A-CENTER AS TO DEFENDANT WILSON BERNADETTE ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUL-27-1992 AT 08:00 AM IN DEPT 00
SUBSTITUTED PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT WILSON BERNADETTE
UNTIMELY SERVICWE AS TO B. WILSON, NOT SERVED 20 DAYS PRIOR HRG. ON SUBSERVICE.
SMALL CLAIMS DISPOSITION JUL-27-1992, ADMINISTRATIVE CONTINUANCE TO AUG-12-1992 AT 08:00 AM IN DEPT 04

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RENT-A-CENTER RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT WILSON BERNADETTE $478.37 PRINCIPAL, $37.50 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $515.87, RETURN OF MERCHANDISE- TV, VCR, STEREO SYSTEM, OAK CABINET STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
